owned_files.notes: 34 food ingredients catalogued. Schema: id, name, category (sweetener, seasoning, additive, etc.), chemistry_compound_id (cross-reference), common_use, allergen_class, description. Includes sugar, HFCS, honey, salt, citric_acid, caramel_color.
RON format sample food item (73 lines). Structured item with ingredients list, nutrition facts, allergens, preparation method.
RON format sample food item (85 lines). Structured with ingredient breakdown, nutrition, allergen mappings.

gaps: Bulk of top-1000 grocery items (only 2 sample food products present)

Brand variants and product lines (multiple versions of common items)
summary: Scaffold in place (2 RON products, 34 ingredients). Active: expand to hundreds of real-world grocery items with full ingredient & nutrition traceability.
